name: circuit
description: Claude Code plugin that runs configurable developer flows. Current wired state: `/circuit:run` classifies free-form tasks into the current router-supported flows (`explore`, `review`, `fix`, or `build`) and invokes the selected flow through the direct `./bin/circuit-next` launcher; `/circuit:explore`, `/circuit:review`, `/circuit:fix`, and `/circuit:build` remain explicit flow commands. Future stages add `migrate`, `sweep`, and user-authored custom flows with per-step model + reasoning-effort + skills configuration.
